comments.body:
@cgwalters Skopeo’s tests have recently started failing with
```
error[E0603]: module `process` is private
   --> /root/.cargo/registry/src/github.com-1ecc6299db9ec823/cap-std-ext-1.0.2/src/cmdext.rs:38:25
    |
38  |                 rustix::process::fchdir(dir.as_fd())?;
    |                         ^^^^^^^ private module
    |
note: the module `process` is defined here
   --> /root/.cargo/registry/src/github.com-1ecc6299db9ec823/rustix-0.36.11/src/lib.rs:226:1
    |
226 | pub(crate) mod process;
    | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
Could you help fix this, please?

This is beyond my expertise, an earlier succeeding build (https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5899270910377984 is one of the last ones that passed) is using the same versions of these two crates AFAICS.
Looks like a regression in rustix 0.36.  https://github.com/coreos/cap-std-ext/pull/30 will fix this.
